allow: Bash(awk -F, 'NR==1{for\(i=1;i<=NF;i++\) {if\($i=="type"\) tcol=i; if\($i=="is_big_chance"\) bc=i; if\($i=="is_big_chance_shot"\) bcs=i}} NR>1 && \(bc||bcs\) && \($bc=="TRUE"||$bc=="True"||$bcs=="TRUE"||$bcs=="True"\) {print $tcol}' '/e/Personal Projects/xG-app/backend/data/whoscored_Arsenal_vs_Liverpool_all_events.csv')

Bash(awk -F, 'NR==1{for\(i=1;i<=NF;i++\) if\($i=="xT"\) col=i} NR>1 && col && $col!="" && $col!="0" && $col!="0.0" {count++} END{print "non-zero xT events:", count+0}' '/e/Personal Projects/xG-app/backend/data/whoscored_Arsenal_vs_Liverpool_all_events.csv')

Bash(awk -F, 'NR==1{for\(i=1;i<=NF;i++\) if\($i=="xT"\) col=i} NR>1 && col && $col != "" {sum += $col; count++} END{print "total xT events:", count+0, "avg:", \(count ? sum/count : 0\)}' '/e/Personal Projects/xG-app/backend/data/whoscored_Arsenal_vs_Liverpool_all_events.csv')
